title: Commodities edge higher as the market braces for further rate hikes
section_path: Commodities edge higher as the market braces for further rate hikes
section_path_text: Commodities edge higher as the market braces for further rate hikes
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Appetite for riskier assets remained weak ahead of the FOMC meeting on Wednesday. Nevertheless, commodities managed to edge higher amid signs of robust physical demand. Image reference: 1663627362286.png | assets/2022-09-20_commodities-edge-higher-as-the-market-braces-for-further-rate-hikes_img_1663627362286_3a66b34931f6.png
Crude oil eked out a small gain, aided by a weaker USD.
